## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./... -race` passes
- [ ] `go build ./cmd/giraffemail` succeeds
- [ ] Frontend: `cd frontend && pnpm build` (if UI changed)
- [ ] Golden rule preserved (no server delete without verified archive)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or real credentials in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated for user-visible changes
